zh.Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Tosny於大約1140年出生在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德時，他的父親Roger de Tosny III37歲，母親Gertrude de Hainault32歲。他於1155年之後與Marguerite Beaumont在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1162年在他的家鄉享年24歲。

zh-hans.Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Tosny于大约1140年出生在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德时，他的父亲Roger de Tosny III37岁，母亲Gertrude de Hainault32岁。他于1155年之后与Marguerite Beaumont在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1162年在他的家乡享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Tosny was born about 1140, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Roger de Tosny III, was 37 and his mother, Gertrude de Hainault, was 32. He married Marguerite Beaumont after 1155, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1162, in his hometown, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Tosny est né environ 1140, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Tosny III, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Hainault, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite Beaumont après 1155, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1162, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Tosny um 1140 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Tosny III 37 und seine Mutter Gertrude de Hainault 32. Er hat nach 1155 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England Marguerite Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1162 im Alter von 24 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Tosny è nato il circa 1140 nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Tosny III, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude de Hainault, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite Beaumont dopo il 1155, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1162, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアド
ja.Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディエウアコンチェス-エン-オウチェ
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Tosnyが約1140年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで生まれた時，父Roger de Tosny IIIは37歳，母Gertrude de Hainaultは32歳であった。1155年以後にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドでMarguerite Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1162年に故郷で24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Tosny(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Tosny III(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude de Hainault(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1155년 이후 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 Marguerite Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1162년 그의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1140–about 1162: tany ho any amin'ny 1140–tany ho any amin'ny 1162

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Tosny nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Tosny III, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Hainault, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite Beaumont após 1155, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1162, em sua cidade natal, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Tosny родился около 1140 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Tosny III было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Hainault, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite Beaumont после 1155 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1162 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 24 лет.

sm.about 1140–about 1162: e tusa o le 1140–e tusa o le 1162

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Tosny nació aproximadamente 1140, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Tosny III, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Hainault, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Marguerite Beaumont después de 1155, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1162, en su pueblo, a la edad de 24 años.
